name: Bug report
about: A verifier accepts something it should reject, rejects something valid, or crashes on input
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug

**Which module** (webauthn / attestation / zerotrust / challenge / policy / cli)


**Expected behavior**

**Actual behavior** (include the `VerificationError.code` if any)

**Environment** (Python version, passkit version, OS)
